business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction - healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

positives: Formal return-to-work or modified duty program in place
Maintains OSHA 300 logs and conducts regular job-site safety audits
Formal written safety program in place
concerns: Certificates of insurance are not required from all subcontractors before work begins
Hold-harmless agreements are not obtained from all subcontractors
Hazardous materials are used or encountered in operations
Prior policy with Zurich Insurance Group was cancelled in 2022
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 13 claims in 2024 with Nationwide Insurance, 10 claims in 2023 with Berkshire Hathaway Guard, and 4 claims in 2022 with Zurich Insurance Group (cancelled).

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction - healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania. 40% of work is performed by subcontractors vs. own employees.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Applicant maintains a formal safety program, a formal return-to-work or modified duty program, maintains OSHA 300 logs, and conducts regular job-site safety audits.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history shows 13 claims in 2024, 10 claims in 2023, and 4 claims in 2022. The 2022 policy with Zurich Insurance Group was cancelled.
